the patient also meets the qualifying criteria for coverage of home health services, 
payment may be made for the reasonable and necessary home health services the patient 
needs, notwithstanding the availability of coverage in a skilled nursing facility. 

EXAMPLE 3: 

A patient who needs skilled nursing care on an intermittent basis also hires a licensed 
practical (vocational) nurse to provide nighttime assistance while family members sleep.
